system.description:
These bulky goggles (most often worn by Space Marine Scout snipers) provide the wearer with a number of vision enhancements. There are many models and variants of these goggles.

Features

  • Photo-Visor: No penalties due to darkness
  • Preysense: +20 to vision-based Perception Tests at night or in the dark
  • Radiation Detection: Can detect and see a broad range of radioactivity frequencies
  • Pict-Capture: Can record images
  • Optical Enhancement: 5x magnification
  • Micro-Magnification: 5x for close inspection
  • Colored Filters: Multiple filters that can be flipped in and out of view ports
  • Laser Range Finder: Allows wearer to act as forward observer or fire controller for artillery and aerospace units by pinpointing targets, calculating firing solutions, and broadcasting data. Grants +20 to allied unit's Ballistic Skill Test when guiding artillery or aerospace fire.
